match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-1",
    "title": "Reporter typing urgently in modern newsroom",
    "storyBeat": "Establish the busy newsroom and reporter's urgency ahead of live broadcast",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent dynamic tension, sensory-sharp editorial energy, effortlessly cool pre-broadcast rush."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-2",
    "title": "Overhead close-up of typing keyboard",
    "storyBeat": "Emphasize tactile urgency of preparation",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Tactile urgency and dynamic preparation, golden twilight mood with immediate real-life energy."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-3",
    "title": "Producer rushes in with breaking news",
    "storyBeat": "Introduce breaking story about the serum",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent breathless editorial energy, fresh sensory effortlessly cool, golden twilight immediacy."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-4",
    "title": "Paper exchange at desk",
    "storyBeat": "Reveal the headline of the story",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent dynamic sensory-sharp, fresh effortlessly cool editorial tension."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-5",
    "title": "Reporter reacts to story and counts down",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter gets excited and prepares to go live",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Electric urgent dynamic sensory-reset excitement effortlessly cool poised tension before live countdown"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-6",
    "title": "Live feed preparation and earpiece adjustment",
    "storyBeat": "Final prep before going on air",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - LIVE FEED PREP",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent dynamic effortlessly cool, sensory reset poised for live broadcast, fresh high-energy editorial vibe."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-7",
    "title": "City skyline view through rainy window",
    "storyBeat": "Atmospheric cutaway to city establishing timeliness",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "EXT. CITY SKYLINE THROUGH WINDOW",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh sensory effortlessly cool, gritty urban timeliness with tactile immediacy."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-8",
    "title": "Reporter delivers breaking news voiceover",
    "storyBeat": "Live broadcast begins with serum hype",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM ON AIR - LIVE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent dynamic sensory-sharp with effortlessly cool live broadcast tension, fresh and immediate."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-9",
    "title": "Serum product insert and final reporter smile",
    "storyBeat": "Product showcase and call to action",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM ON AIR - LIVE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh sensory effortlessly cool urgency, real-context magic, golden twilight mist softening the energy."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene-10",
    "title": "Title card and fade out",
    "storyBeat": "Closing title for the serum drop",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "",
    "timeOfDay": "",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool, clean and immediate"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.

response.content: {"scenes":[{"sceneId":"scene-1","musicDesign":{"presence":"moderate","style":"pulsing electronic","mood":"urgent","atmosphere":"busy modern newsroom, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-2","musicDesign":{"presence":"minimal","style":"subtle electronic","mood":"tense","atmosphere":"close-up keyboard in newsroom, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-3","musicDesign":{"presence":"moderate","style":"driving cinematic","mood":"breathless urgent","atmosphere":"newsroom corridor rush, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-4","musicDesign":{"presence":"minimal","style":"tense synth","mood":"anticipatory","atmosphere":"newsroom desk, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-5","musicDesign":{"presence":"full","style":"building electronic orchestral","mood":"excited tense","atmosphere":"newsroom desk countdown, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-6","musicDesign":{"presence":"moderate","style":"poised synth","mood":"high-energy tension","atmosphere":"newsroom live prep, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-7","musicDesign":{"presence":"minimal","style":"ambient pads","mood":"gritty atmospheric","atmosphere":"rainy city skyline through window, twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-8","musicDesign":{"presence":"full","style":"dramatic cinematic","mood":"urgent dynamic","atmosphere":"live newsroom broadcast, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-9","musicDesign":{"presence":"moderate","style":"uplifting electronic","mood":"excited cool","atmosphere":"on air product showcase, golden hour twilight"}},{"sceneId":"scene-10","musicDesign":{"presence":"minimal","style":"fading ambient","mood":"resolving","atmosphere":"clean title card fade out"}}],"tags":"instrumental, cinematic, electronic, urgent, tense, building, pulsing, synth, dramatic, twilight","prompt":"Instrumental cinematic track with pulsing electronic synths and building tension that captures the urgent rush and excitement of a modern newsroom preparing for a live breaking news broadcast during golden hour twilight, escalating to dramatic highs before a subtle fade out."}
